languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн о чем-то тихо перешептывается с сервочерепом. Поймав ваш взгляд, техножрец печально улыбается.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, не беспокойтесь — мой разум все еще ясен, насколько это возможно. Но привычки трудно искоренить, даже такие как общение с фигментом собственного воображения. Я все еще помню о судьбе Нунциуса и знаю, что я должен сделать". {n}Он прикрывает глаз и шепчет:{/n} "Омниссия, дай мне сил..."

{n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡正对着那伺服头骨轻声低语。察觉到你的视线后，技术神甫伤感地笑了笑。{/n}“行商浪人，别担心，我的头脑还很清醒。但习惯很难根除，比如跟自己幻想出来的东西对话这种习惯。我仍记得努恩修斯最终的命运，也知道自己该做什么。”{n}他闭上眼睛，低声呢喃，{/n}“欧姆尼赛亚，赐予我力量吧……”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡正对着那伺服头骨轻声低语。察觉到你的视线后，技术神甫伤感地笑了笑。{/n}“行商浪人，别担心，我的头脑还很清醒。但习惯很难根除，比如跟自己幻想出来的东西对话这种习惯。我仍记得努恩修斯最终的命运，也知道自己该做什么。”{n}他闭上眼睛，低声呢喃，{/n}“欧姆尼赛亚，赐予我力量吧……”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn está susurrando discretamente al servocráneo. Cuando ve que lo estás mirando, el tecnosacerdote esboza una triste sonrisa.{/n} «Pierda cuidado, Comerciante Independiente; sigo estando lúcido. Pero cuesta mucho deshacerse de las viejas costumbres, incluso las que implican comunicarse con un producto de mi propia imaginación. No he olvidado el destino de Nuncius, y sé lo que debo hacer». {n}Luego cierra su único ojo orgánico y añade entre dientes:{/n} «Omnissiah, dame fuerzas...».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

Cuando ve que lo estás mirando, el tecnosacerdote esboza una triste sonrisa.{/n} «Pierda cuidado, Comerciante Independiente; sigo estando lúcido. Pero cuesta mucho deshacerse de las viejas costumbres, incluso las que implican comunicarse con un producto de mi propia imaginación. No he olvidado el destino de Nuncius, y sé lo que debo hacer». {n}Luego cierra su único ojo orgánico y añade entre dientes:{/n} «Omnissiah, dame fuerzas...».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn murmure quelque chose discrètement au servocrâne. Lorsqu'il vous remarque, le technoprêtre sourit tristement.{/n} « Ne vous inquiétez pas, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, mon esprit reste clair. Mais les habitudes sont difficiles à changer, même lorsqu'il s'agit de communiquer avec un produit de son imagination. Je n'ai pas oublié ce qui était arrivé à Nuncius et je sais ce que je dois faire. » {n}Il ferme les yeux et murmure :{/n} « Omnimessie, donnez-moi la force... »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn murmure quelque chose discrètement au servocrâne. Lorsqu'il vous remarque, le technoprêtre sourit tristement.{/n} « Ne vous inquiétez pas, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, mon esprit reste clair. Mais les habitudes sont difficiles à changer, même lorsqu'il s'agit de communiquer avec un produit de son imagination. Je n'ai pas oublié ce qui était arrivé à Nuncius et je sais ce que je dois faire. » {n}Il ferme les yeux et murmure :{/n} « Omnimessie, donnez-moi la force... »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn flüstert dem Servoschädel etwas zu. Als er deinen Blick bemerkt, lächelt der Techpriester traurig.{/n} "Keine Sorge, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} ... meine Geist bleibt klar. Aber Gewohnheiten lassen sich nur schwer ablegen, das gilt auch für Zwiegespräche mit einem Hirngespinst der eigenen Fantasie. Ich erinnere mich allerdings an das Schicksal von Nuncius und weiß, was ich tun muss." {n}Er schließt sein Auge und flüstert:{/n} "Omnissiah, gib mir Kraft ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

Aber Gewohnheiten lassen sich nur schwer ablegen, das gilt auch für Zwiegespräche mit einem Hirngespinst der eigenen Fantasie. Ich erinnere mich allerdings an das Schicksal von Nuncius und weiß, was ich tun muss." {n}Er schließt sein Auge und flüstert:{/n} "Omnissiah, gib mir Kraft ..."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, usulca hizmelete fısıldıyor. Bakışlarını yakalayan Tekno Rahip, hüzünle gülümsüyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, merak etmeyin... Zihnim berraklığını koruyor. Ancak alışkanlıkların kökünü kazımak zordur, insanın kendi hayal ürünüyle iletişim kurması gibi bir alışkanlık olsa bile. Nuncius'un kaderini hâlâ hatırlıyorum ve ne yapmam gerektiğini biliyorum." {n}Gözünü kapatıp fısıldıyor.{/n} "Hermesih, bana güç ver..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, usulca hizmelete fısıldıyor. Bakışlarını yakalayan Tekno Rahip, hüzünle gülümsüyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, merak etmeyin... Zihnim berraklığını koruyor. Ancak alışkanlıkların kökünü kazımak zordur, insanın kendi hayal ürünüyle iletişim kurması gibi bir alışkanlık olsa bile. Nuncius'un kaderini hâlâ hatırlıyorum ve ne yapmam gerektiğini biliyorum." {n}Gözünü kapatıp fısıldıyor.{/n} "Hermesih, bana güç ver..."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは、サーヴォスカルに静かにささやきかけている。あなたの視線に気づき、技術司祭は悲しげに微笑む。{/n}「ローグトレーダー、ご心配なく――私の精神は明晰なままです。しかし、習慣というものは根絶しがたいものでして。たとえそれが、自らの想像の産物に語りかけるという習慣であろうとも。私は今なおヌンキウスの末路を覚えており、自分が何をなすべきかも分かっています」{n}彼は目を閉じ、ささやく。{/n}「オムニッシアよ、我に力を……」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is whispering quietly to the servo-skull. Catching your gaze, the Tech-Priest smiles sadly.{/n} "Rogue Trader, do not worry — my mind remains clear. But habits are hard to eradicate, even habits such as communicating with a figment of one's own imagination. I still remember the fate of Nuncius, and I know what I must do." {n}He closes his eye and whispers,{/n} "Omnissiah, give me strength..."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは、サーヴォスカルに静かにささやきかけている。あなたの視線に気づき、技術司祭は悲しげに微笑む。{/n}「ローグトレーダー、ご心配なく――私の精神は明晰なままです。しかし、習慣というものは根絶しがたいものでして。たとえそれが、自らの想像の産物に語りかけるという習慣であろうとも。私は今なおヌンキウスの末路を覚えており、自分が何をなすべきかも分かっています」{n}彼は目を閉じ、ささやく。{/n}「オムニッシアよ、我に力を……」
